3150160.name: Another Pint
3150160.description:
Another Pint is a management game set in a medieval low fantasy world where you get to build and run your own tavern. Make choices that shape every part of the experience, from the way you build the tavern, to the drinks you serve in it, to the people you meet and the relationships you develop, then watch the game respond and adapt as you play.

With Another Pint's versatile build mode, you can make your tavern your own. From the walls and windows, to the chests and chairs, to the cups and candles, every part of it is up to you.

  • Create and destroy to your heart's content as you grow your tavern to suit your ever changing needs. Build it up, make it pretty, dig a dungeon, turn the whole thing into a warehouse, where you take it is for you to decide.

  • Focus on flavor and set the right tone for the right customer. Your decisions will affect what patrons expect and how they react to their experiences. Particularly special setups can attract particularly special guests.

  • Get into the finest details with cosmetic pillars, beams, and clutter. Use our beam and clutter generation or hand place every little thing to give a room that lived-in look.

What’s a tavern without drink? Stock up on imported drinks, mix them together, or create your own from scratch and add them to the menu through our in-depth drink and menumaking systems. As a barkeeper, you must know what goes into each drink, and with time, you'll come to know what your clients want as well.

  • Whether bought or brewed, all drinks have their own tastes, traits, and aromas. A drink is defined by what goes into it and how it was produced, and Another Pint's many ingredients provide immense variety in what you can make.

  • Adapt your menu, including its content, drink serving sizes, and prices, to hit just the right balance and optimize your profits (or at least minimize your losses). Just make sure to keep your clients' tastes in mind, as patrons won't be happy if no options fit their tastes.

  • Specialized tools and equipment allow you to create drinks previously unavailable. Over time, your selection will grow alongside your knowledge as you master the position of tavernkeeper.

  • Running out of a key ingredient? Keep the drinks flowing by setting up farming plots in your garden and grow a consistent stream of all you need.

In Another Pint, everyone you meet is a fully featured character, with taste preferences and personalities to learn and adapt to. You can pick and chose who you care for, but remember, how you treat your patrons will affect how they treat you.

  • Patrons can be fond of many tastes, but they can also hate some. Listen to what they tell you and adapt to what they want to improve your reputation and gain rewards.

  • Manage varied clients, stir up conversations, and forge relationships. While friendships flourish in the night, so do slights and fights. Some drunks may share gifts and secrets, while others grow more belligerent. Do your best to manage these behaviors, or fool around and risk finding out.

  • Accommodate for the discerning customer to attract important figures who bring rare quests and opportunities with them.

Tired of long nights and disruptive drunks? Get some fresh air, explore the local outpost, and venture out into the island. Beyond lie forests, caves, cliffs, and more. Across them all, you'll find various points of interest, new ingredients to take home and make drinks with, and more. The world outside is full of surprises waiting to be discovered.

  • Traverse the wilderness in search of special ingredients. Maybe find a particularly interesting mushroom, maybe something more. 

  • Do quests for clients as you wander, finding objects and completing puzzles. Use distinguishing features to find your way to what you're looking for.

  • Secrets? What secrets?
